# Tentra

> Tentra is a personalised revision app for UK SQE (Solicitors Qualifying Exam) candidates — study planner, MCQ practice, mock exams, AI coach and progress analytics for SQE1, FLK1, FLK2 and SQE2.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Tentra's personalised SQE revision app, features and pricing.
- [Tentra Pro](/pro): Premium plan with mock exam forecasts, smart re-planning and deeper AI insights.
